name: Par 3 Simulator

setup.description: Play from your tier's yardage range: 80-120 yards (High), 120-150 yards (Mid), 135-165 yards (Low), or 150-180 yards (Scratch+). Play 9 balls, one at a time, as if each were its own par 3 hole — pick a new distance and target inside your range every shot.

rules.description: Play 9 balls, treating each shot like a fresh hole at a new yardage inside your tier's range. Reset your routine between every ball.
scoring: 1 point per ball that finishes on the green
Change the distance and target within your tier's range every shot

caption: Nine holes, one club, zero mulligans. Play it like it counts. #golfable #golftok #golfpractice #loweryourhandicap
